title: leucanthemum alaunicum
intro: Leucanthemum alaunicum, also known as Alaun daisy, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from pain and swelling, and protection against infections. Leucanthemum alaunicum is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves are sometimes used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
